This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: noopener-allow-popups/unsafe-none
  step_wait_func: Opener popup.window becomes null Timed out waiting on condition
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: noopener-allow-popups/noopener-allow-popups
  step_wait_func: Opener popup.window becomes null Timed out waiting on condition
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: noopener-allow-popups/same-origin
  step_wait_func: Opener popup.window becomes null Timed out waiting on condition
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: noopener-allow-popups/same-origin-allow-popups
  step_wait_func: Opener popup.window becomes null Timed out waiting on condition
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, but further popups with no COOP can access their opener: same-origin-allow-popups/noopener-allow-popups
  assert_false: Opener is null expected false got true
[FAIL] noopener-allow-popups ensures that the opener cannot script the openee, even after a navigation: unsafe-none
  assert_equals: expected null but got object "[object Window]"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
